mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.warehouse_id, c.name AS customer_name, o.order_date, o.total_amount, o.discount_amount, o.final_amount, o.status, o.remark, o.created_by, o.created_at, o.updated_at, o.confirm_time, o.deliver_time FROM sal_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sal_order ( order_no, customer_id, warehouse_id, order_date, total_amount, discount_amount, final_amount, status, remark, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{warehouseId}, #{orderDate}, #{totalAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sal_order WHERE status = #{status}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no, o.customer_id, o.warehouse_id, c.name AS customer_name, o.order_date, o.total_amount, o.discount_amount, o.final_amount, o.status, o.remark, o.created_by, o.created_at, o.updated_at, o.confirm_time, o.deliver_time FROM sal_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sale_outbound s WHERE s.sale_order_id = o.id) ORDER BY o.id DESC
